ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot holding an imaginary radio to its ear, mimicking the action of listening.  The sequence will focus on one arm, the right arm, to avoid unnecessary complexity. The other arm will remain at its side.  The movement will be smooth, highlighting the act of bringing the hand to the ear and then holding it there. The sequence will use 4 frames to show this progression effectively. Frame 1 will show the arm at rest. Frame 2 will show the arm beginning to move towards the ear. Frame 3 will show the arm reaching the ear and holding the radio. Frame 4 will show the arm slightly adjusting its position to enhance the listening posture.

frames.beat: arms rest at sides, holding an imaginary radio
right arm begins to lift towards the ear
right hand reaches the ear, tuning in to listen
adjusting grip slightly, engrossed in the broadcast
